scenarios.id: Boolean4 - NOT logical operations-[1] Logical negation of truth values
scenarios.description: [1] Logical negation of truth values
scenarios.query: RETURN NOT true AS nt, NOT false AS nf, NOT null AS nn

scenarios.id: Boolean4 - NOT logical operations-[2] Double logical negation of truth values
scenarios.description: [2] Double logical negation of truth values
scenarios.query: RETURN NOT NOT true AS nnt, NOT NOT false AS nnf, NOT NOT null AS nnn

scenarios.id: Boolean4 - NOT logical operations-[3] NOT and false
scenarios.description: [3] NOT and false
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n)
WHERE NOT(n.name = 'apa' AND false)
RETURN n
